title: pelargonium honestum
intro: Pelargonium honestum is a species of flowering plant in the genus Pelargonium, native to the western and northern parts of South Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of Pelargonium honestum include its ability to alleviate cold and flu symptoms, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
